calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRET L. WONG; Clerk: Jeffrey Lee/J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Continued To Mar-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. JENNIFER EMMANEEL, ESQ. of McDowall Cotter, APC (Tel: 650-572-7933) appearing for plaintiff John Furlan;
Atty. MICHAEL L. MAU, ESQ. of The Mau Law Firm (Tel: 415-495-8082) appearing for defendant House of Music of San Francisco.

The matter is argued and submitted by counsel for parties. The Court modifies its tentative ruling and rules as follows: Defendant House of Music of San Francisco's demurrer to both causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff John Furlan is sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to both causes of action. No opposition filed.

FORMAL ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2018 Continued To Oct-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Mau, Esq. 415-495-8082 of the Mau Law Firm for Defendant HOUSE OF MUSIC OF SAN FRANCISCO.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Defendant reports a first amended complaint has been filed.
The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HOUSE OF MUSIC OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF JOHN FURLAN.

Off-calendar a first amended cmplaint is filed and moots the motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
